📄 검색 페이지 요약 [2026년 02월 22일]
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
* 리니지 클래식 (Lineage Classic) is a PC game developed by NCSOFT.
* The game was released in 1998 and has been updated with new content over the years.
* The latest version of the game, Lineage Classic, was released in 2026.
* The game offers various features such as character customization, skill development, and party-based combat.
* Players can choose from a variety of classes, including Warrior, Magician, and Archer.
* The game has a large community of players and offers various events and activities.
* The game's storyline is based on the original Lineage IP and includes new content added to the game.
* The game offers various levels of difficulty and a high-level raid called "Eternal Kingdom" that requires coordination and strategy to complete.
* Players can also participate in player-versus-player (PvP) combat and clan wars for rewards and recognition.
